# Ajin Varghese Chandy | Full Stack Product Builder

> Ajin Varghese Chandy is a Full Stack Product Builder who designs, builds, and ships scalable web products. He focuses on automation, real-time systems, AI integrations, and developer tooling.

Languages: JavaScript (TypeScript), Python, HTML, CSS — Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS — Backend: Node.js, Express.js — Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL.

## Portfolio

- [Homepage](https://ared.dev): Single-page portfolio with hero, skills, technical experience, projects, reviews, and contact form.
- [Admin Panel](https://ared.dev/admin): Password-gated dashboard for editing all site content live (skills, hero, experience, projects, social links, footer, reviews, contact email).

## Social & Contact

- [GitHub](https://github.com/aajinn): Open-source projects and tools.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ajin-varghese-chandy-1654a4276): Professional profile and experience.
- [X / Twitter](https://x.com/areddev): Updates and announcements.
- Email: careerajin@gmail.com

## Projects & Products

- [Real-Time Internet Speed Monitor](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/real-time-internet-speed/baffnjfijbgpjchgdmbnpkloeccnhenl): Chrome Extension — 1,000+ active installs for real-time network speed tracking.
- [MongooseNet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/MongooseNet/): NuGet package — A C# library for schema-flexible data handling in MongoDB.
- [TaskFlow](https://ared.dev): Full-stack project management app with WebSocket collaboration, JWT auth, and role-based access.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (App Router, RSC, `"use cache"` components)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS, PostCSS
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL) with Row-Level Security
- **Email**: Nodemailer via SMTP (contact form delivery)
- **Hosting**: Self-hosted Next.js (Node.js server)
- **Caching**: Next.js `"use cache"` with `cacheLife` and `cacheTag`/`revalidateTag`

## Optional

- [AGENTS.md](https://ared.dev/AGENTS.md): AI agent instructions for project conventions.
- [README.md](https://ared.dev/README.md): Project overview and setup guide.
